{# Full-site navigation for the left (primary) sidebar. pydata's stock ``sidebar-nav-bs`` only shows the sub-tree of the *current* top-level section, which is empty for a flat doc set. We instead render the global toctree (including the hidden toctrees defined in index.rst) so the whole navigation lives in the left sidebar. The right "On this page" TOC is a different component (page-toc) and is unaffected. #}

{{ _("Navigation") }}

{{ toctree(maxdepth=2, collapse=False, includehidden=True, titles_only=True) }}
